# Load the quranic_verses.json and search for the given text.
import json, os, sys, re
path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

# Inspect structure
len(data), type(data[0]) if data else None

target = "وَقَضَى رَبُّكَ أَلّا تَعْبُدُوا إِلاّ إِيَايَ"
matches = [entry for entry in data if entry.get("ayah_text") == target]
len(matches)

# Build normalization function
import unicodedata
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]')
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Remove tashkeel and other arabic diacritics
    text = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')
    # Normalize hamza forms to bare alef where appropriate
    # convert آ أ إ to ا, and remove dagger alif? keep normal alef
    text = text.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # Normalize taa marbuta to ha? no
    # Remove punctuation and diacritics remains
    # Remove punctuation marks common in Arabic and braces and quotes etc
    text = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9]', '', text)  # keep arabic letters and digits
    # Lowercase? Arabic has no case
    return text

norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
norm_target[:100], len(norm_target)

matches_q = [e for e in data if "قَضَى" in e.get("ayah_text","") or "قضى" in e.get("ayah_text","")]
len(matches_q), matches_q[:10]

# Find the candidate entry we saw
candidate = [e for e in data if e.get("surah_id")==17 and e.get("ayah_id")==23][0]
cand_text = candidate.get("ayah_text")
cand_text

content.text: {"correction":"۞ وَقَضَىٰ رَبُّكَ أَلَّا تَعْبُدُوا إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ وَبِالْوَالِدَيْنِ إِحْسَانًا ۚ إِمَّا يَبْلُغَنَّ عِنْدَكَ الْكِبَرَ أَحَدُهُمَا أَوْ كِلَاهُمَا فَلَا تَقُلْ لَهُمَا أُفٍّ وَلَا تَنْهَرْهُمَا وَقُلْ لَهُمَا قَوْلًا كَرِيمًا"}
